messages.content: 有语法错误么： The metal particle size effects in catalysis for many structure-sensitive reactions has been studied.

Yes, there is a grammar error in the sentence. It should be:

"The effects of metal particle size on catalysis for many structure-sensitive reactions have been studied."
为什么不能用in
使用"in"将会导致介词短语"in catalysis"与主语"metal particle size effects"之间存在语法不一致。"Effects"是一个复数名词，因此需要使用"have been"作为谓语动词，而不是"has been"。因此，应该使用"on"作为介词来连接主语和介词短语。
语法检查：Incipient-wetness impregnation method was adopted to synthsize the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts

这个句子的语法是正确的。但是单词 "synthsize" 应为 "synthesize"，因此句子的正确写法应该是：

"Incipient-wetness impregnation method was adopted to synthesize the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts."
英文重写：0.1 g of the reduced catalyst was degassed in He flow at 300 °C for 0.5 h and cooled to 133 K.
The reduced catalyst weighing 0.1 g was subjected to degassing in a helium flow at 300 °C for 0.5 h, and later cooled down to 133 K.
英文重写：Moreover, the high nickel dispersion of the catalyst provides an excess of metal sites, resulting in the rate-limiting reaction occurring on the acid sites
In addition, the catalyst's highly dispersed nickel provides an excess of metal sites, causing the rate-limiting reaction to take place on the acid sites.
英文重写：Smaller Ni particles show a great synergetic effect between acid and metal sites.
The smaller nickel particles demonstrate a significant synergistic effect between the acid and metal sites.
重写
请提供需要重写的原句以及您期望的改动和修订，以便我可以为您进行精确的修改和改进。
英文降重： Smaller Ni particles show a great synergetic effect between acid and metal sites.
Ni particles of smaller size exhibit a strong synergistic effect between the acid and metal sites.
英文降重：The structural features of the catalysts were determined by using XRD (PANalytical B.V. Netherlands) with Cu Ka radiation (k = 0.15418 nm) operated at 40 kV and 40 mA.

The catalysts' structural characteristics were assessed using a PANalytical B.V. Netherlands XRD instrument, which operated at 40 kV and 40 mA and utilized Cu Ka radiation with a wavelength of 0.15418 nm.
英文重写：temperature-programmed reduction of hydrogen
Hydrogen temperature-programmed reduction (H2-TPR)
英文重写： the intermediate comes into more acid sites during it diffusion to Ni sites
The intermediate comes in contact with more acid sites as it diffuses towards the Ni sites.

把compared with SAPO-11放最后面：Compared with SAPO-11, the decrease in BET surface area and pore volume of the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts is ascribed to the attack of solvent molecules to the framework, as well as the blockage of metal species on the mesopores

The decrease in BET surface area and pore volume of the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts is ascribed to the attack of solvent molecules to the framework, as well as the blockage of metal species on the mesopores, compared with SAPO-11.
不要逗号

Compared with SAPO-11, the decrease in BET surface area and pore volume of the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts is attributed to the attack of solvent molecules on the framework and the blockage of metal species in the mesopores.
Compared with SAPO-11放后面不要逗号

The decrease in BET surface area and pore volume of the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts is attributed to the attack of solvent molecules on the framework and the blockage of metal species in the mesopores, compared with SAPO-11. (这句话按照这种语序是不太符合英语语言习惯的，为了避免表意不清，建议使用前文所述的语序和标点）
英语降重：the destruction of the pore structure from solvents and coverage of acid sites by metal species
Solvent exposure causes pore structure degradation and metal species deposition blocks acid sites.
语法对么：The results suggest that reducing the particle size of Ni promotes the synergy between metal and acid sites
是的，这个句子的语法是正确的。
suggest和promotes两个谓语么
这个句子只有一个谓语，即"suggest"。整个句子的结构是“主语+动词+suggest+宾语”，其中宾语是“reducing the particle size of Ni promotes the synergy between metal and acid sites”，也就是说，谓语动词"suggest"的宾语并不包含动词"promotes"。
英语重写：which favor the intermediate’s timely hydrogen on the metal sites instead of excessive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking on acid sites
These conditions promote the timely hydrogenation of the intermediate on the metal sites, rather than excessive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking on the acid sites.
表达什么意思：The catalysts exhibit the diffraction peaks at 2 Theta= 8.1°, 9.4°, 13.1°, 15.6° and 23.2° of the AEL topology
这段话说明了催化剂的衍射图谱中出现了一些特定的衍射峰，这些峰对应的2θ角度分别为8.1°、9.4°、13.1°、15.6°和23.2°。同时，这些峰还具有AEL拓扑结构的特征。
语法有问题么：The catalysts exhibit the diffraction peaks at 2 Theta= 8.1°, 9.4°, 13.1°, 15.6° and 23.2°, which ascribed to the AEL topology

这句话的语法有点问题。可以改成以下两种方式：

1. The catalysts exhibit diffraction peaks at 2 Theta values of 8.1°, 9.4°, 13.1°, 15.6°, and 23.2°, which are attributed to the AEL topology.

2. Diffraction peaks observed at 2 Theta values of 8.1°, 9.4°, 13.1°, 15.6°, and 23.2° in the catalysts are attributed to the AEL topology.
